text:

Author: sbruno

Log:
  Repair a overflow condition where a user could submit a string that was
  not getting a proper bounds check.

  Thanks to CTurt for pointing at this with a big red blinking neon sign.

  Submitted by:	sson

  MFC after:	3 days
